steps.title: Find the cause and result
steps.content: Peru lowered the voting age from 21 to 18. As a direct result, many young people gained a new opportunity to participate in the country's political process.

steps.title: Reject wrong relations
steps.content: A signals similarity, B signals contrast, and D signals concession despite an obstacle. The second sentence is not similar, opposite, or surprising; it follows from the age change. A result transition is needed. The answer is C.
